title: Freight Ghast
description: Gives happy Ghasts the ability to hold chests.
body:
Make Happy Ghasts be able to carry chests.

`Rightclick` the Happy Ghast with a chest `six times` to put on all the chest.
You can access the chest's inventory by `shift rightclicking` the Happy Ghast.

The Happy Ghast can hold a double chest of Items.

## Coming soon
- Neoforge port
- Rout planning for Happy Ghasts and automatic flying of said rout
